overview.description: The Return Stacked Global Stocks & Bonds ETF (RSSB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by holding global equities and US Treasury futures. The fund uses leverage to stack the total return of its equity holdings with the potential returns of the futures contracts RSSB was launched on Dec 4, 2023 and is issued by Return Stacked.

data.title: Gold ETFs: The top funds to gain commodity exposure
data.text: Gold prices (GC=F) have shot up to an all-time high earlier this week as the commodity rallies this late into 2023. VettaFi Financial Futurist Dave Nadig is calling gold an "inbetweener asset" positiv...
